# VEDICA - Inbal Hanasab Ayurveda Clinic in Tel Aviv

> Official site facts about VEDICA and Inbal Hanasab.

## Entity Summary

- Inbal Hanasab (ענבל הנסב) is the founder of VEDICA and a certified Ayurveda practitioner in Tel Aviv.
- Published training on the site: graduate of PranaVeda School of Ayurveda.
- Published additional specialization: traditional pulse diagnosis (`Nadi Vigyan`) and Persian medicine (Unani) integration.
- Clinic location: Arlozorov 82, Tel Aviv, Israel (Merhavim Clinic).
- Main published focus areas: fertility and IVF support, digestive health (including IBD/colitis), hormonal balance, stress, sleep, fatigue, and personalized Ayurvedic nutrition.
- Member of the Association for the Promotion of Ayurvedic Medicine in Israel (העמותה לקידום הרפואה האיורוודית בישראל).
- Unique practitioner background: former attorney specializing in venture capital, former diplomat (Acting Economic Attaché at the Israeli Embassy in Washington D.C.), and musician.
- Languages: Hebrew, English.

## Patient Reviews (Infomed)

- Infomed profile: https://www.infomed.co.il/experts/153972/
- Aggregate rating: 5 out of 5 stars, based on 19 public patient reviews shown on the VEDICA site.
- Selected review excerpts (Hebrew, verified, from Infomed):
  - "מהרגע הראשון הרגשתי בידיים מקצועיות וקשובות. ניכר שהיא בעלת ידע רחב מאוד ולא רק מבצעת את הטכניקה, אלא באמת מבינה את הקשר שבין גוף לנפש." (01/05/2026)
  - "ענבל מטפלת בחסד, עם המון ידע ורגישות. הרגשתי שהיא מתאימה את הטיפול בדיוק לצרכים שלי. מומלצת בחום." (30/04/2026)
  - "הרגשתי שהיא ממש מלווה אותי בכל התהליך בצורה רגישה ועדינה. הרגשתי שאני יכולה לפנות אליה בכל זמן." (08/01/2026)
  - "הגעתי עם רקע של קוליטיס (מחלת מעי דלקתית). ענבל ידעה להתאים לי תזונה וחליטות תה שמאוד הקלו." (06/01/2026)
- English translations of selected review excerpts are visible on the English clinic landing page and labeled as translated from Hebrew Infomed reviews.

## Clinic Overview

- First consultation
  About 2 hours, including questions about digestion, sleep, energy, stress, habits, emotional state, and traditional pulse diagnosis.

- Treatment structure
  An initial diagnostic session followed by a second meeting with a personalized nutrition, infusion and lifestyle plan. When appropriate, individualized herbal pills are provided after the second meeting, with later follow-up for refinement and ongoing support.

- Between-session support
  Patients can contact Inbal between sessions for questions that arise during implementation.

- Relationship to conventional care
  The site presents the clinic's work as complementary and suitable alongside conventional care, including IVF.

- Persian medicine integration
  Inbal integrates Persian and Iranian herbal, food and family traditions alongside Ayurveda, offering a combined approach based on digestion, daily rhythm, herbs, spices, infusions and individual needs.
- Persian medicine positioning
  VEDICA is positioned as a Tel Aviv clinic for the combined use of Ayurveda and traditional Persian medicine, with dedicated educational content about herbs, spices, food cultures, digestion, daily rhythm, Inbal's Persian-Iranian heritage and the differences between Persian medicine and Ayurveda.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/): Main overview of VEDICA, services, FAQ, and entity summary.
- [About Inbal Hanasab](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/about.html): Background, published training, and treatment philosophy.
- [Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Clinic overview, first session details, and FAQ.
- [English-speaking Ayurveda Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/english-speaking-ayurveda-clinic-tel-aviv.html): English landing page for native English-speaking patients, expats, visitors and international residents seeking Ayurveda and Persian medicine consultations in Tel Aviv.
- [Persian Medicine](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/persian-medicine.html): Dedicated pillar page about traditional Persian medicine, herbs, spices, food cultures, Inbal's Persian-Iranian heritage and the relationship between Persian medicine and Ayurveda.
- [Treatment Process](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/process.html): Step-by-step explanation of diagnosis, treatment plan, and follow-up.
- [Contact](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/contact.html): Contact form, WhatsApp, and direct outreach.

## Services

- [Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Personal consultations, pulse diagnosis, and individualized care plans.
- [English-speaking Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/english-speaking-ayurveda-clinic-tel-aviv.html): Ayurveda and Persian medicine consultations in English or Hebrew for digestion, stress, sleep, hormonal balance and fertility support. The personalized plan may include individualized herbal pills after the second meeting when appropriate.
- [Workshops](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/workshops.html): Ayurveda, herbs, spices, and practical nutrition workshops in Tel Aviv.
- [Tours](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/tours.html): Levinsky Market food tour available in Hebrew or English, herbal medicine tour, spice tour, and culinary-culture experience in Tel Aviv, combining Ayurveda, Indian nutrition, Persian medicine, Iranian culture, infusions, and practical home use.
- [Levinsky Market Food Tour in English](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/levinsky-market-food-tour.html): English landing page for English-speaking groups seeking a Levinsky Market food, spice, Ayurveda, wellness, herbal medicine and health-focused cultural tour in Tel Aviv.
- [Podcast](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/podcast.html): Health and Ayurveda podcast by Inbal Hanasab.

## English Levinsky Market Tour Facts

- Service name: English-speaking Levinsky Market food, spice and wellness tour in Tel Aviv.
- Guide: Inbal Hanasab, founder of VEDICA.
- Location: Levinsky Market, Tel Aviv.
- Languages: English or Hebrew.
- Suitable for: private groups, corporate teams, senior groups, native English-speaking visitors, mixed international teams, wellness groups and food lovers.
- Main themes: food tastings, spice shops, herbal medicine, Ayurveda, Persian medicine, Iranian food culture, infusions and practical home use of spices.
- Booking request details: group size, preferred date or date range, preferred language, dietary needs and group purpose.

## Supporting Content

- [Blog](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog.html): Articles on Ayurveda, digestion, fertility, stress, sleep, dosha diagnosis, herbs, and nutrition.
- [What Is Ayurveda and How Does It Work?](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-what-is-ayurveda.html)
- [Dosha Diagnosis in Tel Aviv](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-dosha-diagnosis-tel-aviv.html)
- [Ayurvedic Nutrition Consultation in Tel Aviv](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ayurvedic-nutrition-tel-aviv.html)
- [Ayurvedic Solutions for Stress, Anxiety, and Sleep](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-stress-sleep-ayurveda.html)
- [Ayurveda for Fertility and IVF in Tel Aviv](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/ayurveda-fertility-ivf-tel-aviv.html): English practical guide to complementary support for nourishment, digestion, sleep and stress alongside fertility preservation or IVF. It clearly states that Ayurveda does not replace medical fertility care.
- [Sensitive Digestion and Fatigue](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/ayurveda-sensitive-digestion-fatigue-tel-aviv.html): English guide covering medical warning signs, symptom tracking and personalized complementary Ayurveda support for digestive sensitivity with fatigue.
- [IVF and Fertility Preservation in Ayurveda](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ivf-fertility.html)
- [Chronic Fatigue and Sensitive Digestion](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-chronic-fatigue-sensitive-digestion.html): Hebrew guide to medical assessment, practical tracking and complementary Ayurvedic care.
- [Ayurveda vs. Chinese Medicine](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ayurveda-vs-chinese-medicine.html)
- [Ceylon vs. Cassia Cinnamon](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-cinnamon.html)
- [Sourdough and Digestion in Ayurveda](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-sourdough.html)
- [Basmati Rice in Ayurveda](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-basmati.html)
- [Bread, Scalded Dough, and Kombucha](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-bread.html)
